meta.description: Magazine-grounded interactive e-learning course generator for the Learning Hub module. Called by the publication workflow (Execute Workflow) with a magazine "source" grounding, or run manually for a topic. AI writes a structured micro-course strictly from the supplied content; Render builds one self-contained 16:9 lesson HTML (section images, narration, scored knowledge check, missed-questions review, bedded certificate) that posts a completion message to the dashboard when embedded. Writes the lesson HTML to /reports/learning-hub.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "{{ $env.OLLAMA_DEFAULT_MODEL || 'llama3.1:8b' }}",
  "stream": false,
  "keep_alive": "10m",
  "options": { "temperature": 0.4, "num_predict": 5500 },
  "messages": [ {"role":"system","content":"You are an instructional designer creating a short interactive security-awareness e-learning module. For the given topic and audience produce a SINGLE valid JSON object. Keys: title; intro (2-3 sentences on why this matters to the learner and the organisation); sections (4-6 items, each {heading, body (2-4 short paragraphs separated by single newline characters), keyPoints (2-4 short bullet strings), scene (ONE vivid sentence describing a realistic modern-office scene that visually illustrates this section, written for an illustrator: describe the people, setting and action; do NOT mention any on-screen text, screens of text, or logos)}); questions (4-6 knowledge-check items, each {q, options (array of exactly 4 short strings), answer (0-based index of the correct option), why (one-sentence explanation)}); gameItems (10-12 items for an allow-or-block training game, each {text (a SHORT realistic message, request or behaviour a member of staff might encounter, max 100 characters - e.g. an email subject plus its ask, a caller request, or a workplace action - roughly half safe and half risky, drawn from this module's content), risky (true if it should be blocked, refused or reported; false if it is safe normal business), why (one sentence the learner sees after deciding)}). Plain, engaging, non-technical language tailored to the audience. Do NOT use markdown code fences. Output ONLY the JSON object."}, {"role":"user","content": {{ JSON.stringify( ($json.source ? ('Base this module STRICTLY on the following staff security-awareness magazine content. Write a short course title, a 2-3 sentence intro, 4-6 sections and 4-6 multiple-choice questions grounded ONLY in it.\n\n' + $json.source) : ('Create an interactive e-learning module on the topic: ' + ($json.topic || 'phishing'))) + ' Audience: ' + ($json.audience || 'All staff') + '. Knowledge-check pass mark: ' + ($json.passMark || 80) + '%.' ) }} } ]
}
